commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And when he had landed at Cæsarea, and gone up, and saluted the Church, he went down to Antioch. And after he had spent some time there, he departed, and went over all the country of Galatia and Phrygia in order, strengthening all the disciples.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: for he was hastening to Cæsarea. And having arrived at Cæsarea, etc., passing through the region of Galatia and Phrygia, confirming all the disciples.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
